source_pr.title: *: implement non-transactional delete
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: ekexium <ekexium@gmail.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #33485
Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

Add a new syntax to split a delete SQL into multiple.

Example of dry runs:
```sql
MySQL root@localhost:test> split on id limit 3 dry run delete from t
+---------------------------------------------------+
| split statements                                  |
+---------------------------------------------------+
| DELETE FROM `test`.`t` WHERE `id` BETWEEN 1 AND 3 |
+---------------------------------------------------+


MySQL root@localhost:test> split on id limit 3 dry run query delete from t
+------------------------------------------------------+
| query statement                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------+
| select `id` from `test`.`t` where true order by `id` |
+------------------------------------------------------+
```

Example of errors:
```sql
MySQL root@localhost:test> split on id limit 3 delete from t
+-----------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------+
| job                                                       | sql                                               | error                       |
+-----------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------+
| job id: 0, job size: 3, range: [KindInt64 1, KindInt64 3] | DELETE FROM `test`.`t` WHERE `id` BETWEEN 1 AND 3 | injected split delete error |
+-----------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------+-----------------------------+
```

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
Support non-transactional delete statement.
```

fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: "select `a` from `test`.`t` where true order by `a`")) (session/nontransactional_test.go)
